name: Splatterhouse
description: Namco horror action series centered on Rick, the Terror Mask, and monster-filled side-scrolling combat.

eras.title: Arcade and 16-bit Horror Era
eras.description: Splatterhouse establishes its identity through arcade horror action and Mega Drive sequels.

eras.title: Revival Era
eras.description: The series receives a modern revival while retaining its horror beat-em-up identity.
